title: DashboardPayload
description: Schema for the daily Market Mayhem dashboard data payload, designed for direct hydration of Tailwind UI and Chart.js components.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the pipeline execution.

telemetry.description: Current market metrics mapped to UI status cards.

10y_yield_bps.description: US 10-Year Treasury yield in basis points.

hy_spread_bps.description: High Yield credit spread in basis points.

cre_pd_merton.description: Commercial Real Estate probability of default (Merton model output).

traces.description: Log of calculation provenance for terminal display.

source.description: The name of the plugin or module that generated the data.

cluster_id.description: Identifier for the thematic cluster (e.g., from MarketCatalystPlugin).

crypto_spx_corr.description: Calculated correlation between Crypto and SPX.

simulator.description: Inputs bound to the active scenario state for front-end simulation models.

merton_active_scenario.description: The name of the currently active Merton model scenario (e.g., 'Baseline', 'Stress').

delta_spread_shock.description: The simulated shock to credit spreads in basis points.
